---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new generic scar, hook, or framework capability
title: "feat: <short description>"
labels: enhancement
---

## The failure mode this would address

<!-- A scar (and the hook that enforces it) only earns its keep when it
prevents a real, recurring failure. Describe the failure first, the
proposed solution second. If you cannot point to a recurring failure,
this is a preference -- not a scar. -->

## Proposed change

<!-- Concretely: which file(s) change, what new file(s) appear, what the
trigger condition is, what the fix injects. Keep it tight. -->

## Why this belongs in the generic framework (vs. your own fork)

<!-- See CONTRIBUTING.md "What kinds of changes are welcome" -- generic
hooks must be domain-independent and stdlib-only. If your case is
domain-specific (industry, company, product), consider whether it
belongs in `examples/<your-case>/` instead. -->

## Test plan

<!-- How would we verify this works? What inputs trigger it, what inputs
should NOT trigger it? -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- One or two sentences. "We could also..." -->
